title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: It's not the 1970s, but the oil shock is still biting hard
summary: The UK faces significant impacts from rising energy prices despite theoretical insulation compared to global peers. This demonstrates how oil shocks continue to strain developed economies even with diversified energy sources.
content: In theory, the U.K. should be less exposed to the impact of higher energy prices than some peers. In practice, the price surge is having a dire impact.

zh.title: CNBC英国交易所通讯：不是1970年代，但油价冲击仍在持续伤害
zh.summary: 尽管理论上相比全球同行有隔离效应，英国仍面临能源价格上升的重大影响。这表明油价冲击即使在能源来源多样化的情况下，仍继续对发达经济体造成压力。

title: Wegovy pill sales smash forecasts after launch as Novo Nordisk hikes guidance
summary: Novo Nordisk's newly launched Wegovy pill has exceeded sales forecasts in early market performance. The strong results prompted the company to raise its 2026 financial guidance.
content: Novo Nordisk raised its outlook for 2026 after a strong performance from its newly launched Wegovy pill.

zh.title: Wegovy药丸销售在推出后超预期，诺和诺德提高指导预期
zh.summary: 诺和诺德新推出的Wegovy药丸在早期市场表现中超过了销售预期。强劲的成果促使该公司提高了2026年的财务指导。

title: Private credit’s $2 trillion boom raises global stability fears, watchdog warns
summary: The Financial Stability Board warns that the $2 trillion private credit boom poses emerging systemic risks requiring stronger regulatory oversight. The growth in unregulated lending channels is intensifying concerns about financial stability.
content: The Financial Stability Board wants regulators to tighten up their supervision of private credit amid fears of growing stress in the sector.

zh.title: 私人信贷2万亿美元繁荣引发全球稳定性担忧，监管机构警告
zh.summary: 金融稳定委员会警告，2万亿美元私人信贷繁荣带来新兴的系统性风险，需要更强的监管监督。不受监管的借贷渠道增长加强了对金融稳定的担忧。

title: Lufthansa faces nearly $2 billion in extra fuel costs amid Middle East conflict
summary: Germany's Lufthansa airline is absorbing nearly $2 billion in additional fuel costs due to Middle East regional instability. The conflict presents substantial operational and financial challenges for the carrier.
content: Germany's largest airline, Lufthansa, is taking on additional fuel costs as the Middle East conflict poses 'enormous challenges.'

zh.title: 中东冲突中汉莎航空面临近20亿美元燃料成本增加
zh.summary: 德国汉莎航空公司由于中东地区局势不稳定而承担近20亿美元的额外燃料成本。这场冲突对该航空公司的运营和财务构成了重大挑战。

title: Oil prices fall as Trump pauses Hormuz escort effort
summary: Oil prices fell after President Trump announced the U.S. would pause naval escort operations in the Strait of Hormuz. The move signals potential diplomatic progress toward a U.S.-Iran agreement.
content: Oil prices fell after Trump said the U.S. would pause its naval escort endeavor in the Strait of Hormuz, raising hopes of a potential deal with Iran.

zh.title: 油价下跌，特朗普暂停霍尔木兹护航行动
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统宣布美国将暂停在霍尔木兹海峡的海军护航行动后，油价下跌。这一举措预示着朝着美国与伊朗协议迈进的潜在外交进展。

title: China hosts Iran's top diplomat just days ahead of Trump's high-stakes visit
summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is visiting Beijing in his first trip to China since the Iran war began. The diplomatic engagement occurs days before Trump's scheduled high-stakes visit.
content: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi trip to Beijing on Wednesday marks the first time he has visited China since the beginning of the Iran war.

zh.title: 中国在特朗普高风险访华前数日接待伊朗最高外交官
zh.summary: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉赫奇正在访问北京，这是伊朗战争开始以来他首次访华。这一外交活动发生在特朗普计划中的高风险访华前几天。

title: Border politics - how similar jobs in the same firm deliver different tax bills
summary: Workers in identical positions at the same company face significantly different tax bills depending on whether they work in Scotland or England. The border creates substantial tax disparities for equivalent employment.
content: Workers in southern Scotland can find themselves paying more tax than colleagues who live south of the border.

zh.title: 边境政治 - 同一公司相似工作如何导致不同的税单
zh.summary: 同一公司担任相同职位的员工根据在苏格兰或英格兰工作而面临明显不同的税单。边境对同等就业造成了巨大的税收差异。

title: 'I have to make my own dog food' - voters counting living costs on eve of election
summary: British voters face mounting cost-of-living pressures, resorting to extreme measures such as homemade pet food and monthly meal batch-cooking. The financial strain underscores public anxiety ahead of elections.
content: India Lerigo makes her own dog food and batch cooks a month's worth of meals over a weekend to save money.

zh.title: "我必须自己制作狗粮" - 选民在选举前夕计算生活成本
zh.summary: 英国选民面临日益加重的生活成本压力，采取极端措施如自制宠物食品和每月批量做饭。财务压力凸显了选举前公众的焦虑。

title: The baby bank helping struggling parents cope
summary: Little Village reports serving nearly one-third more families in need than in previous years. The surge in demand reflects growing financial hardship among parents seeking assistance.
content: Little Village says it is helping nearly one third more families in need than in previous years.

zh.title: 帮助困难中的父母应对的婴儿银行
zh.summary: Little Village报告服务的需要帮助的家庭比往年增加近三分之一。需求激增反映了寻求协助的父母日益加重的财务困难。

title: In the global AI race, a sanctioned Chinese firm says cheaper models can still win
summary: SenseTime, a sanctioned Chinese AI firm, is pursuing cheaper multimodal models and international expansion to remain competitive. The strategy aims to challenge global competitors despite regulatory constraints.
content: As China’s AI competition intensifies, SenseTime is shifting toward multimodal AI, lower-cost models and overseas expansion to remain competitive, co-founder Lin Dahua said.

zh.title: 全球AI竞赛中，一家受制裁的中国公司表示廉价模型仍能赢
zh.summary: 受制裁的中国AI公司商汤科技正在追求更便宜的多模态模型和国际扩张以保持竞争力。该战略旨在尽管面临监管限制仍能挑战全球竞争对手。

title: Cathedral to help run food share scheme in city
summary: Hereford Cathedral is providing operational support to expand a local food-sharing initiative. The partnership addresses growing community food assistance needs.
content: Hereford Cathedral says it will provide operational support to help the "incredible volunteers".

zh.title: 大教堂帮助运营城市食品共享计划
zh.summary: 赫里福德大教堂正在提供运营支持以扩展本地食品共享计划。该伙伴关系解决了日益增长的社区食品援助需求。

title: Samsung crossses $1 trillion valuation as AI frenzy drives historic rally, lifting shares over 15%
summary: Samsung has achieved a historic $1 trillion valuation driven by AI investor enthusiasm, with shares surging over 15 percent. The rally follows an eight-fold jump in first-quarter operating profits.
content: The rally comes after the company reported an over eightfold increase in first-quarter operating profits last week.

zh.title: 三星突破1万亿美元估值，AI热潮推动历史性涨幅，股价上升超15%
zh.summary: 三星在AI投资者热情的推动下达到历史性的1万亿美元估值，股价上升超过15%。这次涨幅是在第一季度营业利润增长8倍之后。

title: Oil prices ease as US pauses Project Freedom to seek deal with Iran
summary: Oil prices eased after Trump announced a pause to U.S. naval operations in the Strait of Hormuz, signaling a potential path to U.S.-Iran negotiations. The move follows days of rising regional tensions.
content: President Donald Trump raised hopes of an agreement between the US and Iran after days of escalation.

zh.title: 美国暂停"自由行动"计划寻求与伊朗协议，油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普宣布暂停美国海军在霍尔木兹海峡的行动后，油价下跌，预示着美伊谈判可能的道路。此举发生在区域紧张局势升级的数天之后。

title: Ken Griffin: We will create jobs in Miami as a consequence of NYC Mayor Mamdani's wealth tax video
summary: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin countered New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's wealth tax proposal by pledging Miami job creation instead. The clash reflects mounting tensions between wealthy executives and municipal tax initiatives.
content: Ken Griffin, CEO of Citadel, reacts to New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's push to tax the rich, including a video filmed outside of Griffin's Manhattan apartment.

zh.title: 肯·格里芬：作为对纽约市市长曼达尼财富税的回应，我们将在迈阿密创造就业机会
zh.summary: 城堡资本首席执行官肯·格里芬通过承诺在迈阿密创造就业机会来回应纽约市市长佐兰·曼达尼的财富税提案。这次冲突反映了富有高管与市政税收倡议之间日益紧张的关系。

title: Astera Labs’ stock climbs as the company strives to make AI chips more powerful
summary: Astera Labs' stock is rising as the company works to develop more powerful AI chips, supported by upbeat earnings results. The connectivity company's strong performance reflects investor confidence in its AI chip advancement capabilities.
content: The connectivity company also issued upbeat earnings results

zh.title: Astera Labs股价上升，公司致力于开发更强大的AI芯片
zh.summary: Astera Labs股价随着公司开发更强大的AI芯片而上升，由乐观的财务业绩支撑。这家连接公司的强劲表现反映了投资者对其AI芯片先进能力的信心。

title: Super Micro’s stock surges as Wall Street cheers its margin recovery
summary: Super Micro's stock surged 18% as investors celebrated the company's margin recovery, overlooking a revenue shortfall. The AI server maker's gross margin improvement signals potential profitability gains despite missing revenue expectations.
content: Shares of the AI server maker jumped 18% as investors shrugged off a revenue miss and celebrated a rebound in gross margins.

zh.title: 超微股价飙升，华尔街为其利润率恢复欢呼
zh.summary: 超微股价上升18%，投资者庆祝公司利润率恢复，忽视了收入不足。这家AI服务器制造商的毛利率改善预示着潜在的利润增长，尽管未达到收入预期。

title: Upstart’s stock is getting punished after earnings. Here’s the big gripe.
summary: Upstart's stock fell after the AI lending company missed a key profit metric in its earnings report. The company's CEO attributed the shortfall to analyst mismodeling of seasonal trends rather than fundamental business weakness.
content: The AI lending company came up short on a key profit metric, but its CEO says that analysts may have mismodeled seasonal trends.

zh.title: Upstart股价在财报后受挫。这是主要投诉。
zh.summary: AI借贷公司Upstart的股价在错过关键利润指标后下跌。公司CEO将不足归因于分析师对季节性趋势的误估，而非业务基本面衰弱。

title: Apple to pay up to $95 to some US iPhone buyers over AI lawsuit
summary: Apple will pay up to $95 per U.S. iPhone customer to settle a lawsuit over misleading Apple Intelligence advertising claims. The settlement addresses allegations that marketing misrepresented AI capabilities to consumers.
content: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

zh.title: 苹果因人工智能诉讼向美国iPhone购买者支付最高95美元
zh.summary: 苹果将支付每位美国iPhone客户最高95美元来解决关于误导性Apple Intelligence广告宣传的诉讼。该和解针对营销向消费者虚假陈述人工智能能力的指控。

title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Major U.S. stock indices reached record highs on Tuesday, driven by declining oil prices and strong corporate earnings across sectors. This momentum sets the stage for continued market gains in the upcoming trading session.
content: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rose to fresh records on Tuesday, powered by falling oil prices and solid quarterly earnings reports.

zh.title: 周三的大股票故事：下个交易日可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 美国主要股票指数周二创历史新高，受油价下跌和各行业强劲企业盈利驱动。这种势头为即将到来的交易日的持续市场涨幅奠定了基础。
